item.title: Ignorance is dangerous
item.description: "No matter how much you shame and scare them, women will still come for abortions. Pretty recently I had this young woman, 15 maybe, and we did the procedure. I said, ‘Your uterus is empty, the procedure is over. I have to go check to make sure we got everything,’ and I left the room to examine the tissue. Then I came back and told her, ‘Everything’s fine, your uterus is healthy.’ And she said, ‘So … when are you going to use the steel ball?’ I picked my jaw up off the floor and said, ‘Steel ball?’ She said, ‘Well, I went to the crisis pregnancy center and they told me you’re going to put a steel ball that’s covered with sharp blades into my uterus and twirl it around.’ And this kid still came! I was thinking, How did you ever make yourself walk in the office believing I was going to do that?". Bad politics are disgraceful. Remember to vote for the less harmful
item.dc:creator: anthora

item.title: Time for an unhinged Sunday Mini-CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
no reason why it shouldn't be.. greetings online friends. quickie tonight
not sure if they mean ED-209 is the principal or Dick Jones. either way i love Robocop
far out
snacks are good
usually a sci fi guy but here.. fantasy. not a fan of being restrained
it should be a competition
gonna get wasted and use that glove without supervision
relatable
just remember that the next time you are about to diss my dump
i'd rather not
that's my time.. have a great night, gang!!

item.dc:creator: anthora

item.title: Finally....
item.description: *edit* Because it was asked, she's a 2019 Honda Insight Hybrid. At the time of purchase, it was 28K and I leased it for 4 years. I broke the lease a few months early and got a loan from my bank. Been paying the bank for the last 1.5 years. I also added an extra 4 years to the bumper to bumper warranty to cover anything that may come up. The warranty covers everything except the high voltage battery and that is because it's considered a consumable. All in all, the total cost was around 40K. One last note, they hybrid system is fantastic. I average 50 MPG on around 9 gallons of gas. I recommend it to everyone.
item.dc:creator: Steelrose

item.title: Yuen Qiu aka The Landlady
item.description:
Maybe it's because of how iconic Yuen Qiu's styling was in the movie, it's become almost impossible to imagine her not looking like The Landlady. But as it turns out, Yuen Qiu was quite the beauty in her youth. In fact, the actress was reportedly known as one of the prettiest girls in her school.
Unfortunately, Yuen Qiu had trouble finding fame after joining showbiz as a stuntwoman. Before Kungfu Hustle came along, one of her more notable film appearances was in the 1974 James Bond flick The Man with the Golden Gun, where she had a small role as the butt-kicking niece of one of the characters.
In 1985, she married martial arts director Lu Chun Ku and retired from acting to concentrate on taking care of their two children. Although Jackie and Sammo offered to help relaunch her career, it wasn’t until 18 years later when she made her comeback. And that comeback was, as you may have guessed, in Kungfu Hustle.
Edit: top photo most likely not from 2001
item.dc:creator: FineStructureConstant137

item.title: TIL you can more easily pass kidney stones by riding a roller coaster, specifically Big Thunder Mountain in the last car
item.description: More information: https://www.bbc.com/news/science-environment-45513012 Info on preventing kidney stones, in short, drink lots of water, cut back on sodium, cut back on animal protein: https://www.health.harvard.edu/diseases-and-conditions/how-to-prevent-kidney-stones Reference: “Validation of a Functional Pyelocalyceal Renal Model for the Evaluation of Renal Calculi Passage While Riding a Roller Coaster,” Marc A. Mitchell, David D. Wartinger, The Journal of the American Osteopathic Association, vol. 116, October 2016, pp. 647-652. http://broomedocs.com//srv/htdocs/wp-content/uploads/2016/10/roller-stone.pdf
item.dc:creator: rhinokitty

item.title: Since being falsely arrested my life as a musician feels hopeless
item.description:
It's hard to live life anymore. I'm a singer, keyboardist, piano tuner, and rebuilder. In January of 2022 I met the love of my life, Kerry. She inspired me to really start working on my business of piano restoration. My mom loves it and buys me the moving truck (an old Pepperidge Farms delivery truck) to pick up my pianos, and it was all starting to unfold amazingly. I had my first piano student coming to the studio, so I went to Walmart to get a few last-minute touches like cute curtains and some groceries since we were at Walmart. Untill a police officer ran my tags, noticed I had a suspended license, and made a u-turn. By then, Kerry had parked and I came down so she can hand me the groceries.
The officer insists that I was driving even tho I'm bald and her hoodie is flesh colored. He asks for my license even though he already knows me and identified me (its a small coastal town) so I refuse since, in Oregon, the passenger does not have to provide identification.
So he calls for backup and tackles me to the ground and sticks his knee on my face . Then my arresting officer accuses Kerry of pushing him to the backup officers and they arrest her too, which they proceed to refracture her pinky and slam her against the hood of their patrol vehicles so hard she wet her pants from the pressure on her bladder.
Imgur helped me raise $6,500 towards my attorney costs. An imgur user suggested and the imgur community supported it. (Recipes of my expenses are in my other posts, I'm an actual person and there is evidence of the entire creation of the funding here on imgur in my previous posts. Gaining points by falsely claiming I'm a grifter is as damaging to my mental health as any other false claim against me.) The judge and the state found that the officer had no probable cause and that "justice would be served in by a dismissal." How is it justice if it costed me $22,000 to defend myself while my officer has paid administrative leave? How is it justice if my student found out I was arrested and stopped coming? How is it justice if the money my parents had for my business startup went to my attorney? How is it justice if I'm asking pizza angels for food? How is any of this justice?
It would have been cheaper to let the cops walk over me and not fight. "Sue for your money back". Ok, sure... I'll ask my attorney Jeff Jorgensen.
And that's how it goes. I still have three months to take it to court but I need to organize the lawsuit with a representing criminal attorney. So untill I find an attorney willing to put their name on my case I'm SOL. And it's not that any of the attorneys say that i don't have a case, they think I do, it's that they don't have time since processing all the 2020 riot. Any criminal attorney willing to go against the police are swamped. Call the bar, get referenced, get turned down, repeat...
So to keep going I'm editing videos and writing music for my moms children's book. Jimmy and Max's Adventures, escaping the city. Available on Amazon. (My mom would want me to plug the book if I could)
I've also been restoring a one of a kind, first edition 75 year old BURK Almuninum 12 string Electric guitar for the guitars' creator's grandson.
And then there's these two wonderful mental health medicine. They've kept me alive more times than I'd like to admit. Treble Clef (front), Lulu (rear) Thank you for allowing me to vent. Im sorry, I just don't know what to do anymore. I can't afford rent, food, or anything. It's mentally crippling to feel useless and stressed. All because a police officer felt entitled and threatened he was wrong. Oh and I have panic attacks when I see a cop, which is causing me more issues. Anyways, thanks for reading. I hope you all have a musical day!
item.dc:creator: Piano440
